engineers.name: Mateo Alvarez

services.title: Embedded Engineering Teams
services.description: Senior engineers who integrate directly into your workflow, ship from day one, and operate as full members of your team.

services.title: Technical Due Diligence
services.description: Independent architecture, code quality, and scalability assessments for investors and acquirers.

services.title: Greenfield Product Builds
services.description: End-to-end delivery of new products, from architecture and prototyping through launch and handover.

caseStudies.title: Scaling a Payments Ledger to 50k TPS
caseStudies.summary: Re-architected a monolithic ledger into an event-sourced system, achieving a 10x throughput increase with zero downtime migration.

caseStudies.title: Rebuilding a Consumer App Frontend
caseStudies.summary: Delivered a new React design system and accessibility overhaul, cutting load times by 60% and reaching WCAG AA compliance.

caseStudies.title: Productionizing an ML Recommendation Engine
caseStudies.summary: Took a research notebook to a scalable, monitored inference platform serving millions of daily recommendations.

faqs.question: How quickly can an engineer start?
faqs.answer: Most engagements begin within one to two weeks of an initial scoping call, depending on availability and requirements.

faqs.question: Do engineers work in our time zone?
faqs.answer: We match engineers to your working hours wherever possible and guarantee a meaningful daily overlap for collaboration.

faqs.question: What happens if an engineer is not the right fit?
faqs.answer: We offer a no-questions-asked replacement within the first two weeks of any engagement to ensure the right match.
